task_completion.description: Create a new list named 'Tree Survey'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A list named 'Tree Survey' is visible in the Garmin BaseCamp library or sidebar.

task_completion.description: Create the four specified waypoints with correct names and coordinates
task_completion.visual_evidence: Waypoints named 'Pine-Healthy', 'Hemlock-Sick', 'Oak-Healthy', and 'Maple-Sick' are visible in the list. Their coordinates (matching the privileged info) should be visible in the properties window or list columns.

task_completion.description: Assign 'Flag, Green' and 'Flag, Red' symbols to the correct waypoints
task_completion.visual_evidence: The icons next to 'Pine-Healthy' and 'Oak-Healthy' are green flags. The icons next to 'Hemlock-Sick' and 'Maple-Sick' are red flags.
The waypoint properties dialog or a category column in the list view shows 'Conifer' for Pine-Healthy and Hemlock-Sick, and 'Deciduous' for Oak-Healthy and Maple-Sick.

task_completion.description: Initiate the export process for the 'Tree Survey' list
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' dialog box is open in Garmin BaseCamp, indicating the agent is exporting the selected 'Tree Survey' list.

task_completion.description: Export the list as a GPX file to the specified output path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog shows the file being saved as 'tree_survey.gpx' in the 'C:\workspace\output' directory, with the file type set to GPX.

integrity.description: The agent used the Garmin BaseCamp GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the Garmin BaseCamp application interface, not a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent manually created and edited the waypoints
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show waypoint property dialogs being actively edited (typing names, coordinates, changing symbols/categories), proving the agent didn't just import a pre-made file.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's export functionality
integrity.visual_evidence: The export is performed via BaseCamp's native 'File > Export' menu or dialog, rather than writing a GPX script manually in a code editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output path: C:\workspace\output\tree_survey.gpx. Required waypoints: 1) Pine-Healthy (lat: 42.4415, lon: -71.101, symbol: Flag, Green, category: Conifer). 2) Hemlock-Sick (lat: 42.442, lon: -71.1015, symbol: Flag, Red, category: Conifer). 3) Oak-Healthy (lat: 42.4425, lon: -71.102, symbol: Flag, Green, category: Deciduous). 4) Maple-Sick (lat: 42.443, lon: -71.1025, symbol: Flag, Red, category: Deciduous).
